pipes.pipe.pipetargetstatemachineparamet: The parameters for using a Step Functions state machine as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetstatemachineparamet.Description: Specify whether to invoke the Step Functions state machine synchronously or asynchronously.  + `REQUEST_RESPONSE` (default) - Invoke synchronously. For more information, see [StartSyncExecution](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/step-functions/latest/apireference/API_StartSyncExecution.html) in the *AWS Step Functions API Reference*.
